title: Embroidered Table Cover,White Oval Lace Tablecloth Doily Embroidered Floral Table Runner Table Cover Home Decor 16" x 33"
features: High Quality: Made of polyester material, precision weaving process, the tablecloth is wear-resistant, heat-resistant, wrinkle-resistant, supports long-term use, and decorates your desktop.
Size: Approx. 40x85cm/16"*33" inches, with wide coverage, it is a good idea to decorate your dining table. You can place red wine on the tablecloth to create a warm and romantic atmosphere.
Application：Make gorgeous atmosphere for your date, wedding, parties, celebrations, graduations, special event, family dinner party , anniversary, reception, decorations and so on.
Decoration: The pastoral style of the tablecloth is very casual and relaxed, embroidered with beautiful flower patterns, hollowed out in the middle and edges, with distinct lines and retro luxury.
Maintenance: Washable, hollow embroidered tablecloth is easy to clean, reusable after drying, the fabric is soft and foldable, light and compact, easy to store and carry.
